parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "doctype": "RIFAH Session",
  "phone_number": "{{ $json.phone }}",
  "current_step": "{{ $json.nextStep }}",
  "session_data": {{ JSON.stringify($json.sessionData) }},
  "status": "Active",
  "last_activity": "{{ $json.now }}"
}
={{ JSON.stringify($json.payload) }}
={{ JSON.stringify($json.payload) }}
={{ JSON.stringify($json.payload) }}

={
  "messaging_product": "whatsapp",
  "to": "{{ $('State Machine').item.json.phone }}",
  "type": "text",
  "text": {
    "preview_url": false,
    "body": "✅ *Interest Submitted Successfully!*

🎉 Your response has been recorded for lead *{{ JSON.parse($('State Machine').item.json.actionData || '{}').lead_id }}*.

📊 *Your Score:* {{ JSON.parse($('State Machine').item.json.actionData || '{}').compatibility_score || 0 }}/100

⏳ *What happens next?*
• Our team will review your submission
• If selected, we will connect you with the buyer
• You'll be notified within 24-48 hours

_Thank you for using RIFAH Connect!_ 🙏"
  }
}

parameters.name: filters
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify([["city_state","like","%" + ($('Build Premium Lead Data').item.json.location.split(',')[0].trim()) + "%"],["status","in",["Active Free","Active Premium"]],["rifah_id","!=",$('Build Premium Lead Data').item.json.member_id]]) }}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
={{ JSON.stringify({ body: '🔔 NEW PREMIUM LEAD

Lead ID: ' + $('Build Premium Lead Data').item.json.lead_id + '
Member: ' + $('Build Premium Lead Data').item.json.member_name + '
Type: ' + $('Build Premium Lead Data').item.json.lead_type + '
Location: ' + $('Build Premium Lead Data').item.json.location + '
Matches found: ' + ($('Run Matching Algorithm').item.json.matched?.length || 0) + '
Posted to groups: YES (few matches fallback)' }) }}

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify([{role:'system',content:'You are a B2B lead qualification expert for an Indian chamber of commerce.'},{role:'user',content:'Generate 4-6 qualification questions for a ' + JSON.parse($(\'State Machine\').item.json.actionData).lead_type + ' lead: "' + JSON.parse($(\'State Machine\').item.json.actionData).lead_description + '" Location: ' + JSON.parse($(\'State Machine\').item.json.actionData).lead_location + '. Return JSON: {"questions":["q1","q2",...]}'}]) }}

parameters.name: text
text
parameters.value:
={{ JSON.stringify({ body: '✅ *PREMIUM Introductions Sent!*

📨 Sent personalized messages to *' + $json.total + ' vendor(s)*
⏰ Vendors have 12 hours to respond

You will be notified when vendors qualify and admin approves a connection.

_Lead ID: ' + $json.leadId + '_' }) }}

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify([{role:'system',content:'You generate vendor qualification questions for B2B leads in India.'},{role:'user',content:'Generate 6 questions to qualify a vendor for this PREMIUM lead: "' + (JSON.parse($(\'State Machine\').item.json.sessionData || '{}').lead_description || 'product/service lead') + '". Lead type: ' + (JSON.parse($(\'State Machine\').item.json.sessionData || '{}').lead_type || 'BUY') + '. Return JSON: {"questions":["q1",...,"q6"]}'}]) }}

parameters.name: text
text
parameters.value:
={{ JSON.stringify({ body: '📊 *PREMIUM Match Score: ' + $('Calculate Vendor Score').item.json.score + '/100*

' + ($('Calculate Vendor Score').item.json.score >= 80 ? '🌟🌟🌟 Excellent match! Very high probability of connection.' : $('Calculate Vendor Score').item.json.score >= 70 ? '🌟🌟 Strong match. Good candidate.' : $('Calculate Vendor Score').item.json.score >= 50 ? '🌟 Good fit. Moderate match.' : '⚠️ Low match score.') + '

Reply *SUBMIT* to express interest (admin reviews within 2 hours)
Reply *CANCEL* to skip' }) }}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
={{ JSON.stringify({ body: '🤝 PREMIUM VENDOR MATCH FOR APPROVAL

📋 Lead ID: ' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.lead_id + ' ⭐ PREMIUM
👤 Vendor: ' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.vendorInterest.vendor_name + ' (' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.vendorInterest.vendor_id + ')
📍 Phone: ' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.vendorInterest.vendor_phone + '

Match Score: ' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.vendorInterest.match_score + '/100
Compatibility: ' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.vendorInterest.compatibility_score + '/100

AI Recommendation: ' + ($('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.vendorInterest.compatibility_score >= 70 ? '✅ APPROVE' : $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.vendorInterest.compatibility_score >= 50 ? '⚠️ REVIEW' : '❌ CONSIDER DECLINE') + '

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Actions (SLA: 2 hours):
CONNECT ' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.lead_id + ' ' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.vendorInterest.vendor_id + '
DECLINE ' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.lead_id + ' ' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.vendorInterest.vendor_id }) }}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
={{ JSON.stringify({ body: '✅ *PREMIUM Interest Submitted!*

Your interest in this lead has been submitted.
📊 Compatibility Score: ' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.vendorInterest.compatibility_score + '/100

Our team will review within *2 hours* and connect you with the buyer if approved.

You will receive buyer contact details directly on approval.' }) }}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
={{ JSON.stringify({ body: '🎉 *PREMIUM MATCH CONFIRMED!*

Your lead has been matched with a qualified vendor!

🏢 *Vendor:* ' + ($('Get Vendor Details').item.json.data?.[0]?.business_name || 'N/A') + '
📍 *Location:* ' + ($('Get Vendor Details').item.json.data?.[0]?.city_state || 'N/A') + '
🏭 *Industry:* ' + ($('Get Vendor Details').item.json.data?.[0]?.industry || 'N/A') + '
📱 *WhatsApp:* ' + ($('Get Vendor Details').item.json.data?.[0]?.whatsapp_number || 'N/A') + '

Please reach out directly to finalize your deal.

_Lead ID: ' + $('Parse Admin Command').item.json.lead_id + '_' }) }}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
={{ JSON.stringify({ body: '🎉 *PREMIUM CONNECTION APPROVED!*

You have been connected with the buyer!

👤 *Buyer:* ' + ($('Get Lead for Connection').item.json.data?.member_name || 'N/A') + '
📱 *WhatsApp:* ' + ($('Get Lead for Connection').item.json.data?.member_phone || 'N/A') + '
📋 *Lead:* ' + ($('Get Lead for Connection').item.json.data?.title || 'N/A') + '

Please reach out to close the deal!

Good luck! 🤝' }) }}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
={{ JSON.stringify({ body: '❌ *Lead Connection Declined*

Thank you for your interest in Lead ' + $('Parse Admin Command').item.json.lead_id + '.
The admin has decided to proceed with another vendor.

We appreciate your time and will notify you of future matching leads. 🙏' }) }}
